response.justification: Bogdan brings ~13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with strong recent TypeScript/Node.js work at Naver including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly aligns with the AI agent development requirement. Solid React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and testing background, plus Java exposure for the secondary stack. Lacks explicit Nest.js and Vitest mentions, and no PostgreSQL or Kubernetes depth shown, but the breadth and craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, workshops) suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Recent AI-agent and MCP framework experience at Naver matches a key requirement
Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS stack alignment with 13+ years total experience
Demonstrated engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev, public workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
PostgreSQL and Kubernetes depth not clearly demonstrated
Significant portion of career in DLang, which is not part of the target stack
